creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #3)
> Set to expire 20 August with the rest of the unmaintained interactive ports.

I'm sorry, I was on vacation. I don't really maintain this port any more and I think it can be removed now since it isn't needed for the documentation build. If it is still needed, someone will save it. Thanks for your work on cleaning this up.
